hooks.command: PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); re.search(r'(git commit|bun run build|bun run e2e|bunx playwright|bunx serve|playwright test)', cmd) and print('{\"systemMessage\": \"[家老警告] 重い実作業コマンドを検出。侍・忍者へ委譲または run_in_background で実行せよ。\"}')" || true
hooks.statusMessage: 重い実作業チェック中...
